summary: Iteration 68: Tested Universal Search and Bot Handler Endpoints. All 18 backend tests pass. Frontend verified: OrderBot shows correct action buttons for Amazon orders (Process in CRM/Already Dispatched when not in CRM, Prepare Dispatch when in CRM) and RTO returns (Add to Inventory, Send to Repair, Repair Yard, Dead Stock).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 68 verified the new Universal Search and Bot Handler endpoints. Key findings: 1) GET /api/bot/universal-search/{query} searches across amazon_orders, pending_fulfillment, dispatches, incoming_queue, finished_good_serials, tickets (lines 36239-36422), 2) Amazon orders NOT in CRM return actions=['import_to_crm', 'mark_already_dispatched'] (line 36280), 3) Amazon orders IN CRM return actions=['prepare_dispatch', 'view_details'] (lines 36281-36284), 4) Incoming returns return actions=['add_to_inventory', 'send_to_repair', 'send_to_repair_yard', 'mark_dead_stock'] (line 36338), 5) Frontend OrderBotWidget.jsx correctly displays action buttons based on search results.

universal_search_endpoint.details: GET /api/bot/universal-search/{query} searches all collections and returns appropriate actions

amazon_order_not_in_crm_actions.details: Returns actions=['import_to_crm', 'mark_already_dispatched'] when order not in CRM

amazon_order_in_crm_actions.details: Returns actions=['prepare_dispatch', 'view_details'] when order already in CRM

mark_amazon_dispatched.details: POST /api/bot/mark-amazon-dispatched creates dispatch record for historical orders

handle_rto_actions.details: POST /api/bot/handle-rto handles add_to_inventory, send_to_repair, send_to_repair_yard, mark_dead_stock

serial_info_endpoint.details: GET /api/bot/serial-info/{serial_number} returns full serial history with dispatch/warranty info

master_skus_endpoint.details: GET /api/bot/master-skus returns list of SKUs for selection

frontend_process_in_crm_button.details: OrderBotWidget shows 'Process in CRM' button for Amazon orders not in CRM

frontend_already_dispatched_button.details: OrderBotWidget shows 'Already Dispatched' button for Amazon orders not in CRM

frontend_rto_action_buttons.details: OrderBotWidget shows Add to Inventory, Send to Repair, Repair Yard, Dead Stock buttons for incoming returns
